notes: The original lerobot_alohamini checkout remains the source of robot code.
CLI installation leaves the original source tree unchanged by default.
GUI recording uses the companion entry and leaves upstream examples/alohamini/record_bi.py unchanged.
The released runtime targets the LeRobot 0.6 AlohaMini API family; legacy camera configs remain migratable.
This companion provides GUI, setup scripts, compatibility checks, and minimal GUI-required adapters.
Existing upstream debug scripts are not duplicated; doctor.sh detects and reports whether they exist.
